headline: Halozyme Announces Global Collaboration and License Agreement with Incyte to Support the Development of Subcutaneous Formulations of INCA033989 Using its ENHANZE® Technology
summary: Halozyme Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: HALO) ("Halozyme" or the "Company") today announced that it has entered into a global collaboration and license agreement with Incyte (Nasdaq: INCY) to evaluate additional subcutaneous formulations of INCA033989, a first-in-class mutant calreticulin (mutCALR)-targeted monoclonal antibody, in patients with mutCALR-expressing myeloproliferative neoplasms (MPNs), utilizing Halozyme's proprietary ENHANZE® drug delivery technology. The collaboration will focus on
